englishDefinitions: to be willing to do whatever is necessary to achieve a goal, even if it is extreme or unethical
persianTranslation: برای رسیدن به هدف از هیچ کاری دریغ نکردن
examples: The villain would not stop at anything to get power.
She won't stop at anything to protect her family.
He seemed ready to not stop at anything to win the election.
